positive: Minimalist illustration of a stylized forest scene under a crescent moon. The composition features highly contrasting deep indigo blues and vibrant emerald greens, accented by glowing golden yellow fairy lights and bioluminescent toadstools. Central focus on a silhouetted group of stylized forest animals (deer, fox, owl) interacting peacefully. Clean, vector art style with crisp outlines, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Atmospheric, dreamy, and magical. High contrast, symmetrical composition, perfect for textile repeat patterns.
negative: low quality, blurry, fuzzy, grainy, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, messy, disfigured, bad anatomy, artifact, too realistic, photograph, messy background, extra limbs
